title: cleistogenes squarrosa subsp. andropogonoides
intro: Cleistogenes squarrosa subsp. andropogonoides, also known as Chinese panic grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is a perennial plant native to East Asia, commonly found in wetlands and grasslands. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Chinese panic grass include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system, and it can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions.
